report_name: Bank3 Discloses Data Breach After Qilin Ransomware Group's Claims

threat_actors.name: Qilin
threat_actors.description: A notorious and active ransomware group that conducted a double-extortion attack against Bank3, exfiltrating 149 GB of data and claiming responsibility on its dark web leak site. The group was active on the victim's network between July and August 2025.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through ransomware and data exfiltration.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin group exfiltrated 149 GB of sensitive data from Bank3's network before deploying the ransomware payload.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin ransomware payload was deployed to encrypt files across Bank3's network, causing significant operational disruption.

malware.name: Qilin Ransomware
malware.description: The ransomware payload deployed by the Qilin group to encrypt files across Bank3's network as the final stage of a double-extortion attack.

tools.name: Cobalt Strike
tools.description: Used by the Qilin group to map the internal network, escalate privileges, and move towards high-value targets after gaining initial access.

identities.name: Bank3
identities.description: A community bank based in Memphis, Tennessee, that was the victim of a double-extortion ransomware attack by the Qilin group, resulting in the exposure of customer SSNs and financial data.

infrastructure.name: Qilin dark web leak site
infrastructure.description: A dark web site used by the Qilin group to publicly claim responsibility for the attack on Bank3 and threaten to leak stolen data.

indicators.name: LSASS Process Memory Dump
indicators.pattern:
title: LSASS Process Memory Dump
id: 2b1b8b1e-7b1b-4b1b-8b1b-1b8b1b8b1b8b
status: experimental
description: Detects attempts to dump credentials from the LSASS process memory, a common TTP for credential access used by groups like Qilin.
references:
  - https://claimdepot.org/data-breach/bank3-data-breach-exposes-clients-ssns-and-financial-information/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-16
tags:
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.credential_access
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_access
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetImage|endswith: '\lsass.exe'
    GrantedAccess: '0x1010' # PROCESS_VM_READ | PROCESS_QUERY_INFORMATION
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects attempts to dump credentials from the LSASS process memory, a common TTP for credential access.

indicators.name: Kerberoasting Attack Detection
indicators.pattern:
title: Kerberoasting Attack Detection
id: 3c2c9c2f-8c2c-4c2c-9c2c-2c9c2c9c2c9c
status: experimental
description: Detects potential Kerberoasting attacks by monitoring for service ticket requests (Event ID 4769) with RC4 encryption, a technique used for privilege escalation.
references:
  - https://claimdepot.org/data-breach/bank3-data-breach-exposes-clients-ssns-and-financial-information/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-16
tags:
  - attack.t1558.003
  - attack.credential_access
level: high
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4769
    TicketEncryptionType: '0x17' # RC4-HMAC
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects potential Kerberoasting attacks by monitoring for service ticket requests (Event ID 4769) with RC4 encryption.

indicators.name: Suspicious Data Staging Activity
indicators.pattern:
title: Suspicious Data Staging Activity
id: 4d3d0d3a-9d3d-4d3d-ad3d-3d0d3d0d3d0d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of large archive files (.zip, .rar) on servers, which often precedes data exfiltration.
references:
  - https://claimdepot.org/data-breach/bank3-data-breach-exposes-clients-ssns-and-financial-information/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-16
tags:
  - attack.t1560.001
  - attack.collection
level: medium
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.zip'
      - '.rar'
      - '.7z'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of large archive files (.zip, .rar) on servers, which often precedes data exfiltration.

indicators.name: Cobalt Strike C2 Beaconing
indicators.pattern:
title: Cobalt Strike C2 Beaconing
id: 5e4e1e4b-0e4e-4e4e-be4e-4e1e4e1e4e1e
status: experimental
description: Detects network traffic patterns consistent with Cobalt Strike C2 beaconing, characterized by regular, timed beacons to external IP addresses.
references:
  - https://claimdepot.org/data-breach/bank3-data-breach-exposes-clients-ssns-and-financial-information/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-16
tags:
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.command_and_control
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: 
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
    Initiated: 'true'
  timeframe: 1m
  condition: selection | count() > 10
indicators.description: Detects network traffic patterns consistent with Cobalt Strike C2 beaconing.
